osx.command: if [ -x "${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/poetry" ]; then "${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/poetry" install; elif [ -x "$HOME/Library/Application Support/pypoetry/venv/bin/poetry" ]; then "$HOME/Library/Application Support/pypoetry/venv/bin/poetry" install; else export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.poetry/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH"; poetry install; fi

args: if [ -x "${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python" ]; then "${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python" tools/write_vscode_env.py; elif [ -x "${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/poetry" ]; then "${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/poetry" run python tools/write_vscode_env.py; elif [ -x "$HOME/Library/Application Support/pypoetry/venv/bin/poetry" ]; then "$HOME/Library/Application Support/pypoetry/venv/bin/poetry" run python tools/write_vscode_env.py; else export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.poetry/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH"; poetry run python tools/write_vscode_env.py; fi
